title: stelis tolimensis
intro: Stelis tolimensis, also known as the Colombian orchid or Tolima stelis, is a species of orchid native to Colombia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis tolimensis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often consumed as a herbal tea to harness its medicinal properties.
